name: Awaken as college girls with your friends - fight to be the one who can turn back!
description:
Bad News: You and three of your friend are reborn in a new world as female university students.

Good News: You find a note which promises that if you fulfil a specific objective, you'll go back to your old life.

Bad News: Only one of you can go back. The note specifies that the first person to complete the task will be able to return, everyone else will be stuck in these lives forever.

So much for teamwork and camaraderie with your friends! Will you compete with each other to be the winner, or cooperate until you can get an advantage?

Options for opening messages:

These start the same, but progressively provide more details as they go, pick the message depending on which of these areas you want to set for yourself. The three areas are the bodies of the group, the user's new body, and the objective. Alternatively, if you don't like the options I've written up, but you don't want to write your own, you can prompt the bot to fill in these areas instead.

  1. Full user input (No bodies described, objective left blank)

  2. Player focus (The other characters bodies described, user and objective left blank)

  3. Just choose your objective (NPCs and Player bodies described, objective left blank)

  4. Here's one I made earlier (all of these 3 areas are set in advance)

BONUS: 5 - Minimalist in medias res version. As barebones as possible, hopefully this should give you plenty of freedom.

This is an adaptation of my previous bot but I thought it would be fun to have a modern setting, and make it competitive.

I think this general idea has a lot of fun ways to twist and iterate on it. If anyone has any ideas or requests let me know.

A lot of the behind the scenes setup is the same, but of course I rewrote a lot of the finer details to suit the new approach.

I am still fairly new to this whole bot building thing, so constructive criticism (and flattering praise) is very helpful, appreciated, and motivating.
creator: Tedd1
